calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS 450 HAYES VALLEY LLC AND BACK OF THE HOUSE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants 450 Hayes Valley LLC and Back of the House, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is granted. Plaintiff Kiara Maple filed a statement that she agrees to arbitration per the arbitration agreement. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
